title: davallia hirsuta
intro: Davallia hirsuta, also known as the hirsute davallia or hairy davallia, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Davallia hirsuta include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture or extract, allowing for a range of applications in herbal medicine.
